Why is compound interest greater than si: 为什么复利大于简单利息?
Because interest earns interest (compoun: 由于利息赚取利息(抵消效应)
I = Prt (interest only on the original p: I = Prt(只对原始本金有股权)
Which grows more: quarterly or monthly c: 哪些增长更多:季度或每月加工厂?
Monthly (n = 12 vs. n = 4) — more freque: 每月(n = 12对 n = 4) - 更频繁 = 更感兴趣
What is the formula for simple interest?: 简单利息的公式是什么?
I = Prt: I=Prt = Prt = Prt = Prt = Prt = Prt = Prt = Prt = Prt
